raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Preventing evictions is key to addressing homelessness, particularly given the impacts of COVID-19 on vulnerable renters.",
    "Providing legal representation to low-income tenants has proven to be an effective strategy for addressing homelessness.",
    "Data has shown that evictions are a root cause of poverty and homelessness, with nearly 50% of homeless adults citing evictions as a contributor.",
    "Approximately 3% of tenants have legal representation in eviction proceedings, while over 81% of landlords do.",
    "When tenants are represented by legal aid, they avoid disruptive displacement 95% of the time.",
    "Evictions have a disproportionate impact on communities of color, with Black and Latinx renters being overrepresented among eviction defendants.",
    "A 2019 report on the LA Eviction Defense Program estimated that for every dollar spent, Los Angeles would receive approximately $4.50 in value from avoided costs.",
    "Investment in legal aid in Baltimore could result in $17.5 million in costs avoided annually, and in New York City, $320 million annually."
  ]
}
```
